name: Strawberry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour two loaf pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt. Mix well.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture. Pour in the oil and eggs, mixing with a spoon until just combined.
5. Pour the liquid ingredients into the well, stirring gently to combine all ingredients.
6. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour, or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. The bread can be frozen. Slice thinly before completely thawing.
Great Christmas gift!
From Patty Searles Bradbury. From the recipe files of Sylvia Steiger, GEnie THE.STEIGERS, CI$ 71511,2253
